findings.title: Arbitrary callers can re-account an existing Caliber position using manipulable live market state

rejected_candidates.title: Nested LP valuation appears to rely on raw Curve spot state with no TWAP or sanity bounds
rejected_candidates.reason: Plausible, but the available source is only an exploit PoC and does not expose the underlying valuation implementation. As written it is a speculative implementation-detail claim and is not clearly distinct from the confirmed permissionless re-accounting and AUM-update issues above.
